storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the desolate, colorless Kansas prairie and the looming threat of a dual-direction cyclone. The sequence must transition from mundane farm vigilance to escalating dread as weather conditions deteriorate.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- aunt_em
- uncle_henry
- toto

## Required Environments
- farmhouse_interior_and_cellar
- kansas_prairie_landscape

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting shift from bright/gray to dark/stormy
- Wind speed and direction affecting hair and clothing

## Beat List
- BT001: Establishing the desolate landscape and approaching storm
- BT002: Mundane vigilance of the family
- BT003: Escalating dread as storm closes in
